backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that handles user profiles, chart analysis storage/retrieval, user settings, Gemini API key management, and role-based access control using mixins for blob storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component purposes, UI text (Portuguese), and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, and settings pages, all wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a useCamera hook that supports starting, stopping, switching, and capturing photos, with all UI text and error messages in Portuguese.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance level lines and directional trend arrows over a chart image retrieved from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop file upload component that validates image formats (PNG/JPG/WebP), rejects HEIC/HEIF files with a Portuguese warning, and enforces a 10MB size limit.
A clickable card component that displays a single analysis history entry with signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/etc.), confidence percentage, trend direction, and timestamp, navigating to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps page content via an Outlet, includes a Toaster for notifications, and renders a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
A visual step indicator component that shows a processing stage as pending, active (spinning loader), or complete (checkmark) based on props.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled setting row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: A card component that displays the primary trading signal (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/etc.) with confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator, styled dynamically based on signal type.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Provides utility functions to build the Gemini Vision API URL with an API key query parameter, retrieve request headers, and validate the stored API key format via the backend actor.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context provider that manages light/dark theme state, persists it to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using TanStack Query, initializing it with an authenticated identity when available and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the captured image and any permission error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity persistence across page reloads, and exposing login/clear functions via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, Gemini API key, and daily operation progress/limits.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Wraps useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings into a single convenience hook exposing settings state and an async update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens, and utility classes for touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component that lets users select a trading chart image via file upload, camera capture, or clipboard, then navigates to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze, history, and settings pages.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using useGetAnalyses, showing a loading state or empty-state prompt when no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Page that loads a chart image from session storage, validates the Gemini API key, runs the AI analysis through staged progress steps, and handles various error states.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Displays the chart analysis results page, reading analysis data from sessionStorage and rendering signal cards, chart overlay, trend/pattern labels, and share/save actions.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure theme, Gemini API key, AI sensitivity, default timeframe, notifications, and daily operation limit, with Internet Identity authentication support.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Service that preprocesses chart images (validates format, resizes if over 4MB) and sends them to the Gemini Vision API for candlestick analysis, returning a typed response.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response, including signal, trend, confidence, patterns, explanation, and error fields.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond BigInt timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date/time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps the external Gemini API analysis response to the internal AnalysisResult format, handling signal/trend/pattern conversions and chart detection errors.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility that shares or copies a formatted analysis summary text using the Web Share API with a clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/border-radius values, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing Advance Signal Pro, a mobile financial chart analysis app using Gemini Vision API, including architecture notes, existing features, and known issues.
